disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Continuous vomiting began within hours of a chemotherapy session and has not stopped for about 12 hours
trigger_question_examples: What was happening just before it began?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started about four hours after my chemo yesterday afternoon and it just hasn't stopped all night.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unable to keep down any oral fluids or the prescribed oral anti-emetic tablets, which are vomited straight back
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to keep any fluids down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, even a sip of water comes straight back up, and I brought the anti-sickness tablets back up twice tonight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked weakness with dizziness and near-fainting on standing, bedbound and dependent on caregiver
trigger_question_examples: How do you feel when you try to sit up or stand?
Have you felt dizzy or faint?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Whenever I try to stand I go really dizzy and feel like I'll pass out, so I've been stuck in bed and my carer has to help me with everything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Markedly reduced urine output over the preceding hours
trigger_question_examples: When did you last pass urine, and how much?
Has your urine become darker or much less than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask, I've barely been to the toilet at all today and what there was looked very dark.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever measured at home and no diarrhoea
trigger_question_examples: Have you checked your temperature, and any fever or chills?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I checked and my temperature was 36.5, no fever, and no, no diarrhoea at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound loss of appetite, altered taste, and unintentional weight loss over two months of treatment
trigger_question_examples: How has your appetite and weight been over recent weeks?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had no interest in food for weeks, everything tastes strange, and I've dropped a fair bit of weight over the last couple of months.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient is part-way through chemotherapy for cancer under an oncology team
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any treatments at the moment?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I'm having chemotherapy for cancer and I'm partway through my cycles.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No headache, no visual change, no new confusion or drowsiness reported
trigger_question_examples: Are you feeling confused, drowsy or hard to keep awake?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No headache or vision problems, and my head feels clear, just exhausted.
